name: Seville Orange Curd
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Cook over a double boiler, stirring constantly until thickened.
Alternatively, microwave the mixture on high for short intervals,
stirring between each interval until it reaches the desired consistency.
3. Strain through a fine mesh and pour into jars.
4. Makes approximately 1 1/2 pounds of curd in total.
